title: IE Mac, no more - IE7, almost
content:
Microsoft has finally removed "Internet Explorer for Macintosh":http://www.microsoft.com/mac/products/internetexplorer/internetexplorer.aspx?pid=internetexplorer from its website.

While at the same time "Internet Explorer 7 Beta 2":http://www.microsoft.com/windows/ie/ie7/default.mspx is available for download.

*Update*

I've downloaded IE7 and I'm looking forward to uninstall it next time I open up my notebook. Even if IE6 is still way off track when it comes to standards (esp. CSS), keep it! IE7 looks UGLY!

*Update 2*

Found the way to "uninstall IE7":http://blogs.msdn.com/ie/archive/2006/01/31/521344.aspx. Right under my nose. - -"
